title: Govviz open public aggregate access policy

open-public-aggregate.label: Open public aggregate
open-public-aggregate.description: Published aggregate statistics that contain no personal data and can be downloaded by people, scripts, search crawlers, and agents without registration.

expectations: Respect HTTP caching and retry headers.
Identify high-volume crawlers with a user agent or contact route.
Do not imply Govviz or the primary producer endorses downstream analysis.

open-public-aggregate.redistribution: Allowed subject to upstream licence terms and attribution.

open-registration-required.label: Open registration required
open-registration-required.description: Open aggregate data that requires a no-fee account, API key, token, or click-through before automated access.

expectations: Document registration steps and rate limits.
Provide a contact route for bulk or agent access.

restricted-sensitive.label: Restricted sensitive
restricted-sensitive.description: Sensitive, personal, confidential, or disclosive data that is not suitable for open publication.

expectations: Use existing legal gateways, disclosure control, accreditation, and secure research access routes.

not-published-by-source.label: Not published by source
not-published-by-source.description: A value or series Govviz cannot republish because no official source publishes the required aggregate in a reusable form.

expectations: Do not invent or infer a public statistic where the producer has not published one.

notes: Govviz republishes downstream compiled public aggregates only.
Govviz does not publish restricted microdata, personal data, or unpublished official statistics.
Each record should cite this policy URI when profile generation supports per-record access policy metadata.
